title: unzip bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[6.0-59.0.1]
- Fix data descriptor length for signed zip [Orabug: 34508726]

[6.0-59]
- Allow decompression of some wrongly compressed files
Resolves: RHEL-86228
full_text:

Resolves: RHEL-86228
